deploy.startCommand: sh -c 'echo "=== Lamma startup (Phase B) ===" && echo "DATABASE_URL: $([ -n "$DATABASE_URL" ] && echo set || echo NOT SET)" && echo "DIRECT_URL: $([ -n "$DIRECT_URL" ] && echo set || echo NOT SET)" && echo "NODE_ENV: $NODE_ENV" && bun ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy ; sh scripts/inject-env.sh ; PORT=3000 bun server.js'
